phrasings.text: before execute_trade runs, require a verified source
phrasings.note: bare tool name as matcher (freeform scan)

provenance.known_limitation_note: Compound evidence_gate scenario cannot be completed through the wizard: the wizard emits q_matcher but answering it (via userText or pill) does not update gate.matcher - the field stays empty and q_matcher loops infinitely. Candidate live bug: the evidence_gate compound wizard does not wire q_matcher answers to the gate.matcher sub-field. The O4 oracle catches this as a loop (3+ consecutive turns with identical fingerprint). To fix: the evidence_gate wizard must process q_matcher answers and update gate.matcher.
